name: List Databases
description: Show all databases in MySQL server.

name: List Tables
description: Show all tables in current active database.

name: Describe Table Structure
description: View column properties and index keys.

name: Create Table
description: Create table with auto-increment primary key.

name: Insert Rows
example: INSERT INTO users (name) VALUES ('Alice Smith'), ('Bob Jones');

name: Select Filter & Limit
description: Select rows matching criteria and limit counts.
example: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'A%' LIMIT 5;

name: Inner Join
description: Select rows having matching keys in both tables.

name: Left Join
description: Select all left rows plus matching right rows.

name: Group and Count
description: Group rows by category and calculate counts.

name: Create Index
description: Create an index to accelerate search lookups.

name: Transactions
description: Execute multiple SQL steps as a single atomic unit.

name: Subqueries
description: Nest queries inside outer select clauses.

name: EXPLAIN Query Plan
description: Analyze query performance and execution paths.
example: EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice Smith';

name: JSON Querying
description: Retrieve attributes inside a JSON column.
